steps.command:
SELECT 
    c.column_name, 
    s.relname AS sequence_name
FROM 
    information_schema.columns c
JOIN 
    pg_class s ON c.column_default LIKE 'nextval(%' || s.oid::text || '%)'
WHERE 
    c.table_schema = 'bookings'
AND 
    c.table_name = 'flights'
AND 
    c.ordinal_position = 1;
steps.output: SELECT 0

    pid,
    relation::regclass AS locked_relation,
    mode,
    granted
FROM
    pg_locks
WHERE
    NOT granted;

steps.command:

FROM pg_stat_activity
WHERE datname = 'demo'
AND state != 'idle'
ORDER BY duration DESC;

207 | postgres | demo | UPDATE bookings.bookings SET total_amount = total_amount WHERE book_ref = '361A07' | active | Lock | transactionid | 0:00:03.752809
209 | postgres | demo | UPDATE bookings.bookings SET total_amount = t

steps.command:
SELECT 
    a.pid,
    a.usename,
    a.query,
    l.locktype,
    l.relation::regclass AS relation_name,
    l.mode,
    l.granted
FROM 
    pg_stat_activity a
JOIN 
    pg_locks l ON a.pid = l.pid
WHERE 
    a.datname = 'demo'
AND 
    l.relation IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    a.query;
steps.output:
pid | usename | query | locktype | relation_name | mode | granted
------+---------+-------+----------+---------------+-------+--------
213 | postgres | SELECT 
    a.pid,
    a.usename,
    a.query,
    l.locktype,
    l.relation::regclass AS relation_name,
    l.mode,
    l.granted
FROM 
    pg_stat_activity a
JOIN 
    pg_locks l ON a.pid = l.pid
WHERE 
    a.datname = 'demo'
AND 
    l.relation IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    a.query; | relation | pg_locks | AccessShareLock | True
213 | postgres |

steps.command:
SELECT 
    a.pid,
    a.usename,
    a.query,
    l.locktype,
    l.relation::regclass AS relation_name,
    l.mode,
    l.granted
FROM 
    pg_stat_activity a
JOIN 
    pg_locks l ON a.pid = l.pid
WHERE 
    NOT l.granted AND
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM pg_locks b WHERE b.locktype = 'relation' AND b.relation = l.relation AND b.mode = 'ExclusiveLock'
    )
ORDER BY 
    a.query;
steps.output: SELECT 0

steps.command:
UPDATE bookings.bookings
SET total_amount = new_total_amount
FROM (
    SELECT b.book_ref, SUM((t.contact_data->>'price')::numeric) AS new_total_amount
    FROM tickets t
    JOIN boarding_passes bp ON t.ticket_no = bp.ticket_no
    JOIN ticket_flights tf ON t.ticket_no = tf.ticket_no
    JOIN flights f ON tf.flight_id = f.id AND f.status = 'confirmed'
    GROUP BY b.book_ref
) AS subquery
WHERE bookings.book_ref = subquery.book_ref AND bookings.total_amount <> subquery.new_total_amount;

    usename,
    query,
    state,
    wait_event_type,

FROM

WHERE

    wait_event IS NOT NULL;

steps.command:
SELECT 
    blocked_locks.pid AS blocked_pid,
    blocked_activity.usename AS blocked_user,
    pg_blocking_pids(blocked_locks.pid) AS blocking_pids,
    blocked_activity.query AS blocked_statement,
    blocking_activity.pid AS blocking_pid,
    blocking_activity.usename AS blocking_user,
    blocking_activity.query AS current_statement_in_blocking_process
FROM 
    pg_catalog.pg_locks blocked_locks
JOIN 
    pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity blocked_activity ON blocked_activity.pid = blocked_locks.pid
LEFT JOIN 
    pg_catalog.pg_locks blocking_locks ON blocking_locks.locktype = blocked_locks.locktype
    AND blocking_locks.database IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.database
    AND blocking_locks.relation IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.relation
    AND blocking_locks.page IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.page
    AND blocking_locks.tuple IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.tuple
    AND blocking_locks.virtualxid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.virtualxid
    AND blocking_locks.transactionid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.transactionid
    AND blocking_locks.classid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.classid
    AND blocking_locks.objid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objid
    AND blocking_locks.objsubid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objsubid
    AND NOT (blocking_locks.granted)
JOIN 
    pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity blocking_activity ON blocking_activity.pid = blocking_locks.pid
WHERE 
    NOT blocked_locks.granted;
steps.output:
blocked_pid | blocked_user | blocking_pids | blocked_statement | blocking_pid | blocking_user | current_statement_in_blocking_process
------------+--------------+---------------+-------------------+--------------+---------------+--------------------------------------

steps.command:
SELECT 
    blocked_locks.pid AS blocked_pid,
    blocked_activity.usename AS blocked_user,
    pg_blocking_pids(blocked_locks.pid) AS blocking_pids,
    blocked_activity.query AS blocked_statement,
    blocking_activity.pid AS blocking_pid,
    blocking_activity.usename AS blocking_user,
    blocking_activity.query AS current_statement_in_blocking_process
FROM 
    pg_catalog.pg_locks blocked_locks
JOIN 
    pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity blocked_activity ON blocked_activity.pid = blocked_locks.pid
LEFT JOIN 
    pg_catalog.pg_locks blocking_locks ON blocking_locks.locktype = blocked_locks.locktype
    AND blocking_locks.database IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.database
    AND blocking_locks.relation IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.relation
    AND blocking_locks.page IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.page
    AND blocking_locks.tuple IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.tuple
    AND blocking_locks.virtualxid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.virtualxid
    AND blocking_locks.transactionid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.transactionid
    AND blocking_locks.classid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.classid
    AND blocking_locks.objid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objid
    AND blocking_locks.objsubid IS NOT DISTINCT FROM blocked_locks.objsubid
    AND NOT (blocking_locks.granted)
JOIN 
    pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity blocking_activity ON blocking_activity.pid = blocking_locks.pid
WHERE 
    NOT blocked_locks.granted;

steps.command:
SELECT 
    pid,
    now() - pg_stat_activity.query_start AS duration,
    query,
    state
FROM 
    pg_stat_activity
WHERE 
    (now() - pg_stat_activity.query_start) > interval '5 minutes'
    AND state != 'idle';
steps.output: SELECT 0

    n_dead_tup AS dead_tuples,

    relname AS table_name,
    indexrelid::regclass AS index_name,
    idx_scan,
    last_vacuum,

FROM

steps.command:
SELECT 
    a.relname AS table_name,
    pg_stat_user_indexes.indexrelid::regclass AS index_name,
    pg_stat_all_indexes.idx_scan,
    b.last_vacuum,
    b.last_analyze
FROM 
    pg_stat_user_indexes
JOIN 
    pg_index ON pg_index.indexrelid = pg_stat_user_indexes.indexrelid
JOIN 
    pg_class a ON a.oid = pg_stat_user_indexes.relid
JOIN 
    pg_stat_all_indexes ON pg_stat_all_indexes.indexrelid = pg_stat_user_indexes.indexrelid
JOIN 
    pg_stat_user_tables b ON b.relid = pg_stat_user_indexes.relid
WHERE 
    pg_stat_all_indexes.idx_scan < 50 AND (b.last_vacuum IS NULL OR b.last_analyze IS NULL);
